title: Set up React Testing Library with Vitest for component tests
summary: Install @testing-library/react and @testing-library/user-event, configure jsdom for Vitest, and write component tests with screen queries, user interactions, and async state.
declaration: I will set up React Testing Library with Vitest for component testing in this project. This requires Vitest to already be configured â€” if it is not, I will set that up first. I will use jsdom as the browser simulation environment.
